content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team(9) ∧ ddl("12 weeks") ∧ store("PostgreSQL") ∧ ops(platform_plus_sec) ∧ traffic(steady) ∧ split(compliance_ready)
P: single_deploy ∧ shared_db ∧ module_boundaries ∧ fast_iteration
V: fits_team_size ∧ meets_deadline ∧ pg_native ∧ low_ops_burden
A: build_modular_monolith ∧ enforce_module_contracts ∧ extract_services_later

[AUDIT]
Goal: modular_monolith.
Constraints: team(9) and deadline("12 weeks") and store("PostgreSQL") and ops(platform_plus_sec) and traffic(steady) and split(compliance_ready).
Plan: single_deploy and shared_db and module_boundaries and fast_iteration.
Verify: fits_team_size and meets_deadline and pg_native and low_ops_burden.
Answer target: build_modular_monolith and enforce_module_contracts and extract_services_later.
